---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new module, improvement, or teaching enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, one-sentence description of what you'd like to see.

## Motivation

What teaching or workshop problem does this solve? Who would benefit?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you imagine this working.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
